symbols.name: InMemoryOrchestrationStorageProvider
symbols.summary: Provides an in-memory orchestration persistence implementation for runtime and unit-test scenarios.

syntax.content: public class InMemoryOrchestrationStorageProvider : IOrchestrationStorageProvider, IOrchestrationInstanceStore, IOrchestrationLeaseStore, IOrchestrationHistoryStore, IOrchestrationSignalStore, IOrchestrationTimerStore, IOrchestrationQueryStore, IOrchestrationAdministrationStore

The current user accessor used for audit metadata.

returns.description: The persisted snapshot with the new version.
